using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
using Moq;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Services;
using Xunit;

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Tests
{
    public class DiaExceptionNotificationServiceTests
    {
        [Fact]
        public async Task NotifyFailureAsync_WhenCalled_ShouldCompleteSuccessfully()
        {
            // Arrange
            var loggerMock = new Mock<ILogger<DiaExceptionNotificationService>>();

            var service = new DiaExceptionNotificationService(
                loggerMock.Object);

            var exception = new InvalidOperationException("Test failure");

            // Act
            await service.NotifyFailureAsync(
                "test-file.txt",
                "DecryptionFailure",
                exception);

            // Assert
            loggerMock.Verify(
                logger => logger.Log(
                    LogLevel.Error,
                    It.IsAny<EventId>(),
                    It.Is<It.IsAnyType>((value, type) =>
                        value.ToString()!.Contains("DIA exception notification required")),
                    exception,
                    It.IsAny<Func<It.IsAnyType, Exception?, string>>()),
                Times.Once);
        }
    }
}
